ruleset_version: Regelverk 2 - Operativt verifieringsregelverk för Certificate of Origin

overall_assessment.human_explanation: Certifikatet avser Ericsson AB och fakturan är utställd av Ericsson AB. Certifikatet innehåller en hänvisning till Letter of Credit (LC NUMBER 09990LCA2501298) vilket aktiverar LC-undantaget. Ursprungsländerna HU, IT och CN som anges i certifikatet kan samtliga identifieras i fakturans Origins-kolumn. Dokumentparet kan godkännas automatiskt.
determination_factors: LC-undantag aktiverat – verifiering begränsad till ursprungsland
Certifikatets LC NUMBER 09990LCA2501298 identifierat som separat fälttext med banktermsbenämning
Ursprungsländer HU, IT, CN alla identifierade i fakturans Origins-kolumn per artikelrad
Fakturanummer 8392007846 matchar mellan certifikat och faktura
Consignor Ericsson AB identisk med fakturans utställare
overall_assessment.debug_explanation: Step 1: Document classification – Document A is a Certificate of Origin (ICC, West Sweden Chamber of Commerce), Document B is a commercial invoice (3 pages) from Ericsson AB. Both are text-based PDF. Step 2: LC check – Certificate box 5 (Remarks) contains 'LC NUMBER 09990LCA2501298'. The phrase 'LC NUMBER' is a separate field label constituting a bankterms designation, followed by a specific number. This is NOT a substring of another reference number. LC exception activated per section 2.2. Step 2b: Consignor search – 'ERICSSON AB' found in invoice header on all 3 pages. Step 3: Extraction performed. Step 4: LC exception active, only origin verification required. Step 5: Origin verification – Certificate box 3 states 'HU, IT, CN'. Invoice has an 'Origins' column per article line: HU (MINI-LINK items), CN (antenna item 0010, TZC 500, Power cable), IT (antenna item 0015). All three origins found in explicit origin fields. Step 6: Consolidation – all applicable checkpoints MATCH → IDENTICAL.

certificate.label: Document A
certificate.quality_notes: Clear text-based PDF, fully legible. Bilingual English/Swedish COO issued by West Sweden Chamber of Commerce, Göteborg.

invoice.label: Document B
invoice.quality_notes: Clear text-based PDF, 3 pages. Ericsson AB branded invoice with structured article table including Origins column.

document_pairing.method: Certificate references invoice number 8392007846 which matches invoice's invoice number field. Consignor Ericsson AB matches invoice issuer.

pairing_validation.notes: All three pairing criteria met: invoice number 8392007846 matches, Ericsson AB is invoice issuer, consignee is 'To order' (Algeria) and invoice customer is in Algeria.

lc_exception_details.verification_statement: The text 'LC NUMBER' appears as a separate label in the Remarks field (box 5), followed by a space and then the number '09990LCA2501298'. This constitutes an explicit bankterms designation ('LC NUMBER') as a separate field label, not a substring of a reference number. LC exception activated per section 2.2.
lc_exception_details.corroborating_evidence: Invoice page 1 contains 'Documentary credit no. 09990LCA2501298' and 'Terms of payment: According to L/C conditions', confirming the LC context.

locations.location: Header/branding area – 'ERICSSON' logo text and footer block 'Ericsson AB'

checkpoints.invoice_value: HU (articles 0001 MINI-LINK 6365 38 A12L, 0001 MINI-LINK 6365 38 A12H, 0002 MINI-LINK 6365 10/11 B03L, 0022 MINI-LINK 6694 Config 15), IT (article 0015 ANT3 1.2 10/11 HP), CN (articles 0010 ANT3 C 1.2 18 HP, 0001 TZC 500, 0023 Power cable)

comparison_steps.details: Invoice has a dedicated 'Origins' column per article line. This constitutes an explicit origin field per section 4.5.1 and the LC-specific origin field requirement in section 2.2.

HU appears in Origins column for articles: MINI-LINK 6365 38 A12L (page 1), MINI-LINK 6365 38 A12H (page 1), MINI-LINK 6365 10/11 B03L (page 1), MINI-LINK 6694 Config 15 (page 2). HU is the ISO alpha-2 code for Hungary. Exact match with certificate's 'HU'.
IT appears in Origins column for article 0015 ANT3 1.2 10/11 HP (page 1). IT is the ISO alpha-2 code for Italy. Exact match with certificate's 'IT'.

CN appears in Origins column for articles: 0010 ANT3 C 1.2 18 HP (page 1), 0001 TZC 500 IF Cable (page 2), 0023 Power cable (page 2). CN is the ISO alpha-2 code for China. Exact match with certificate's 'CN'.

comparison_steps.description: Check for non-listed origins in invoice that contradict certificate
comparison_steps.details: All origins in the invoice are HU, IT, or CN. No origins outside the certificate's listed countries found. No contradiction.

rules_applied.rule_description: LC exception – only origin verification required
Identification of origin in invoice via explicit origin fields
rules_applied.outcome: Invoice has dedicated 'Origins' column per article line – explicit origin field requirement satisfied

rules_applied.rule_description: Normalization of country names – ISO alpha-2 codes used in both documents
rules_applied.outcome: HU, IT, CN are standard ISO alpha-2 codes, exact match, no normalization needed

rules_applied.rule_description: MATCH – each origin country in certificate explicitly identified in invoice

checkpoints.motivation: Certifikatet anger ursprungsländerna HU, IT, CN i ruta 3. Fakturan har en dedikerad 'Origins'-kolumn per artikelrad. HU förekommer för 4 artiklar (MINI-LINK-produkter), IT för 1 artikel (ANT3 1.2 10/11 HP), och CN för 3 artiklar (ANT3 C 1.2 18 HP, TZC 500, Power cable). Samtliga tre ursprungsländer i certifikatet kan identifieras i explicita origin-fält i fakturan. Inga ursprungsländer utanför certifikatets angivelse förekommer i fakturan. MATCH.
checkpoints.debug_explanation: Certificate box 3 states 'HU, IT, CN'. Invoice has a structured table with an 'Origins' column at article-line level. Each of the three ISO alpha-2 codes (HU, IT, CN) appears at least once in the Origins column. No additional origins outside HU/IT/CN are present in the invoice. This constitutes an explicit origin field per section 2.2's LC-specific requirement. All three countries verified → MATCH with high confidence.

rejected_hypotheses.hypothesis: Origins column might not constitute an 'explicit origin field' per LC rule
rejected_hypotheses.rejection_reason: The invoice column is explicitly labeled 'Origins' and contains ISO country codes per article line. This clearly constitutes a dedicated origin field per section 2.2 and 4.5.1.

evidence.section: Origins column, articles 0001 TZC 500 and 0023 Power cable

rule_evaluation_log.rule_description: LC exception – check for Letter of Credit reference in certificate
rule_evaluation_log.evaluation: Certificate box 5 (Remarks) contains 'LC NUMBER 09990LCA2501298'. 'LC NUMBER' is a separate field label constituting a bankterms designation. The number '09990LCA2501298' follows as a specific LC number. This matches the documentary credit number on the invoice ('Documentary credit no. 09990LCA2501298'). LC exception ACTIVATED. Only origin verification required.
Document A (1 page) is the certificate. Document B (3 pages) is the invoice. Single certificate, single invoice. No ambiguity in pairing.

Criterion 1: Certificate references invoice 8392007846 → invoice has number 8392007846 → MATCH. Criterion 2: Certificate consignor 'ERICSSON AB' → invoice issuer 'Ericsson AB' → MATCH. Criterion 3: Certificate consignee is 'TO ORDER OF BNP PARIBAS EL DJAZAIR, Algeria' → invoice customer is in Algeria → MATCH. All three criteria met.
Invoice has a dedicated 'Origins' column in the article table. Country codes HU, IT, CN are assigned per article line. This constitutes explicit origin fields.
Both certificate and invoice use ISO alpha-2 codes (HU, IT, CN). No normalization needed – exact character match.

HU found in invoice Origins column (4 articles). IT found in invoice Origins column (1 article). CN found in invoice Origins column (3 articles). All three certificate origin countries positively verified in explicit origin fields. No contradicting origins found. Result: MATCH.

human_readable_report.summary: LC-undantag aktiverat baserat på LC NUMBER 09990LCA2501298 i certifikatet. Enbart ursprungsland verifierat. Certifikatets ursprungsländer HU, IT och CN kan samtliga identifieras i fakturans dedikerade Origins-kolumn. Resultatet är IDENTICAL och dokumentparet är godkänt för automatisk hantering.

output_quality_checks.consistency_check_details: All applicable checkpoints (origin only, per LC exception) return MATCH. No MISMATCH checkpoints. comparison_result = IDENTICAL is consistent. workflow_recommendation = AUTO_APPROVAL_ELIGIBLE is consistent with IDENTICAL and no blockers. Confidence 0.97 exceeds 0.85 threshold.
